T0179.title: Basic Identity File
T0179.definition: A basic personal profile containing an ID photo, name, ID number, and detailed residential address.
T0179.description: This is the most fundamental personal information unit in illegal data trading, typically including a citizen's ID card front photo, name and ID number, and detailed address. Due to its completeness, this information is a basic material for identity theft and targeted scams, circulating frequently in the black market.
T0179.usageExample: "Individual profiles, front and back of ID, instant delivery before 6 PM."
